Backend Engineer (Python) — Orbit Payments

Orbit Payments is a fast-growing fintech building payment infrastructure for online
marketplaces. We're looking for a Backend Engineer to join our Core Platform team.

What you'll do:
- Design, build, and own REST and internal RPC APIs in Python (FastAPI) that process
  millions of transactions per day
- Improve the performance and reliability of our PostgreSQL-backed transaction ledger
- Build and maintain data pipelines that feed our fraud-detection and reporting systems
- Work closely with product and data teams to ship features end-to-end
- Participate in on-call rotation and drive incident postmortems

What we're looking for:
- 3+ years of backend engineering experience, ideally with Python
- Strong experience with relational databases (PostgreSQL preferred) and query
  optimization
- Experience with caching layers (Redis or similar) in production
- Familiarity with data pipeline / ETL tooling (Airflow or similar) is a strong plus
- Comfortable writing tests and working in a CI/CD environment
- Good communication skills and experience mentoring or reviewing other engineers' code

Nice to have:
- Experience with fintech, payments, or another regulated domain
- Experience with distributed systems or microservices migrations
